description:
A converter designed by video editors. The professional compression tool accessible to all.

Shutter Encoder is one of the best video converter software, it handles images and audio too!
It has been designed by video editors in order to be as accessible and efficient as possible.
Shutter Encoder makes use of FFmpeg to handle its encoding, allowing support for almost every codec you’ve ever heard of, and many more you haven’t.
Don’t just take our word for it though, Avid themselves recommend Shutter Encoder as part of your Media Composer and ProTools ingesting workflow!
- Added "Media Foundation" hardware acceleration for "H.264", "H.265" & "AV1"
- Added "Shutter Encoder OpenGL" shortcut for Windows
- Ability to choose 'x2 T' or 'x2 B' with "Force deinterlacing" checkbox
- Ability to use decimal file size under 10MB
- Ability to use "exiftool" direct command
- Fixed bug with "Create an image sequence from a video" checkbox
- Fixed bug with "H.265" and "Enable alpha channel"
- Fixed bug with editing codecs and audio mapping
- Fixed bug with "Preserve metadata" checkbox
- Fixed bugs with "Display timecode" section
- Fixed bug with "Image cropping" section
- Fixed bug with "Replace audio" function
- Fixed bug with interlacing metadata
- Fixed bug with colorspace metadata
- Fixed Java error at startup
- Various corrections
- Updated ffmpeg, ffprobe
